description: Manages system hosts file entries within a delimited managed block (# BEGIN/END NKS WebDev Console). Auto-adds 127.0.0.1 mappings for every site domain + alias on site creation, removes them on deletion, and recalculates the block after site edits. Requests OS-native elevation (UAC on Windows, TouchID/password via osascript on macOS, pkexec on Linux desktops) only when the hosts file actually needs an update. Keeps a 5-backup rotation of the hosts file before each write so accidental corruption can be rolled back. Also triggers a DNS cache flush after block changes so the new domains resolve immediately.
author: NKS
